source_meta.source_document: JOURNEY II Unicompartmental Knee System launch materials

systems.system_notes: Partial knee arthroplasty platform within the JOURNEY II unicompartmental knee family.

trays.tray_notes: Official launch materials describe a modular two-tray configuration with instrumentation customizable to a familiar surgical flow.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe increased size range for femoral components in the JOURNEY II unicompartmental system.
Official materials describe medial and lateral tibia baseplate options for the JOURNEY II unicompartmental system.
Official materials describe the unicompartmental implant construct and bearing family without exposing full public SKU detail in this pass.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The available official materials are launch and showcase announcements rather than a full public product catalogue.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or technique pass is needed for richer component and product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction stays conservative at tray and implant-family level.
